pages.title: Furnace And Duct Cleaning | What is It? | Why You Need It?
pages.content:
Furnace And Duct Cleaning – Cleaner air is only a phone call away! Harmful contaminants such as dust, dirt, bacteria, and pet dander, collect in your home's air ducts over time...

The company employs NADCA trained technicians using truck mount equipment for professional duct cleaning services.

Your furnace and duct cleaning service is carefully premeditated and closely managed from start to finish to make sure you get the most from your investment.

We guarantee you will be absolutely pleased with our duct cleaning services every time or your money back.

To book an appointment for furnace and duct cleaning please call 780-932-7337.

single_furnace_system.includes: furnace, all ducting (hot and cold), all registers, HWT, one dryer vent

service_process.title: Home Protection
service_process.description: Drop cloths, corner guards, and plastic tape protect the property during service.

service_process.title: HVAC Cleaning
service_process.description: Truck-mount vacuum system uses bypass cleaning method with power-driven whip system to clean ducts using compressed air.

service_process.title: Main Trunk Cleaning
service_process.description: Technicians power whip the main trunk line, forcing contaminants into the truck-mounted vacuum for disposal.

service_process.title: Inspection
service_process.description: High-tech video inspection system allows before-and-after documentation of duct conditions and cleaning results.

pages.guarantee: We guarantee you will be absolutely pleased with our duct cleaning services every time or your money back.

pages.title: Dryer Vent Cleaners
pages.content:
Finding a dryer vent cleaning provider is often harder than it's supposed to be. We make the work simple by providing you with vetted, qualified contractors in your area.

We are in the business of cleaning dryer vents. After countless years of experience, we can claim that we are very efficient in what we do. We provide inexpensive rates and the very best customer service around, you can be certain that our team will take great care of your home!

We know that people today are rather busy. That's why we provide incredibly convenient bookings and annual service contracts are available. So whether you desire us to turn up first thing in the morning or later on in the day, we will do our absolute best to deal with your schedule. We want your experience with our technicians to be so great that you call us back the next year and the year after that.

Home Pros is constantly working to make your experience the best we can. Let us show you why we are, Alberta's #1 choice for finding Dryer Vent Cleaners. So give us a call today for a complimentary "Absolutely No Commitment" quote.
key_selling_points: Alberta's #1 choice for Dryer Vent Cleaners

pages.title: Commercial Duct Cleaning Services
pages.content:
For over 20 years, Home Pros Group has provided professional commercial duct cleaning for heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems (HVAC) cleaning throughout North America.

Call Home Pros Group for your free Commercial Duct Cleaning Quote at 780-932-7337.

If you own or rent a commercial building, you're probably familiar with the term "sick building syndrome". People who spend time in "sick buildings" tend to experience a higher than the average number of physical ailments like colds, flu, dizziness, asthma, headaches, and difficulty concentrating. Symptoms generally improve when people go on vacation and return when they return to work.

Sick Building Syndrome is usually traceable to poor indoor air quality. In many cases of high employee absenteeism, poor indoor air quality is the real culprit. A thorough cleaning of your building's heating, cooling, and ventilation systems can improve indoor air quality (IAQ) and reduce absenteeism. As an added bonus, heating and ventilation systems cleaning can reduce your heating and cooling costs.

For more information on heating and ventilation systems duct cleaning in apartments, hotels, shopping centers, and all other types of commercial buildings, contact us at 780-932-7337. We are oilfield commercial duct cleaning specialists!

cleaning_methods.name: Standard Duct Cleaning
cleaning_methods.description: Cleans the duct system using forced air and a strong vacuum. Recommended for removing dust and debris from the ducting systems of brand new buildings only. Once a building has been occupied, moisture in the air causes the dust to stick to the interior of the ducts, so the building must be cleaned using more advanced technology.

cleaning_methods.name: Power Whip/Viper Method
cleaning_methods.description: Suitable for most cleaning tasks. A power whip cleaning tool is used along with forced air and vacuum to dislodge dirt and debris from the ducts. All commercial, industrial, and institutional cleaning involve either the Power Whip or Pneumatic Brush method.

cleaning_methods.name: Pneumatic Brush Method
cleaning_methods.description: The most advanced of the three commercial duct cleaning methods, giving superior cleaning results. Hi-tech rotating brushes and a strong vacuum are used to clean the ducts. Common in hospital and institutional cleaning, where very high standards of cleanliness are required. White-glove testing of the ducting should detect no dust residue after this method.

services_list: Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning duct systems cleaning
Boiler cleaning (firebox area and most types of heat exchangers)
Dryer room vent cleaning (lint removal for increased dryer efficiency)
guarantees: Photos of ductwork before and after cleaning
Testing to confirm cleaning to specifications (Level 1 or Level 2) of the NADCA standard

services_detailed.name: Duct Cleaning

services_detailed.description: Ensure safety and efficiency for your business with professional dryer vent cleaning. We help minimize fire risks and maintain optimal dryer performance.
